---
title: 'Menu to order'
date: '2010-03-29T18:24:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '6137505224211579157'
blogger_filename: '/2010/03/menu-to-order.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Today I decided to take a step toward expecting God to feed me. I highlighted items in the menus from local restaurants on property. I laid my hands on them and thanked God for meeting my needs and feeding me. I thanked Him for the items highlighted.<br />
<br />
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; I'm placing no time frame, but I'm expected God to meet my desire for good food daily.<br />
<br />
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; So far I'm just sitting here typing, but God is going to meet my needs.<br />
<br />
DW
